reasoning: The control IA-5(8) focuses on managing authenticators for multiple system accounts, which can be mapped to managing Kubernetes ServiceAccounts and their associated tokens. In Kubernetes, ServiceAccounts are used to provide identities to pods, and managing these accounts and their tokens is crucial for security. The suggested functions focus on ensuring that ServiceAccounts are not automatically granted excessive privileges, that their tokens are not automatically mounted unless necessary, and that unique tokens are used to prevent unauthorized access.
title: Authenticator Management - Authenticator management | multiple system accounts implement [ assignment
